summary: Completed testing of 7-Day Free Trial Email Automation feature. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Automations tab in admin sidebar, automation card with 7-day configuration, template dropdowns populated from Resend API, Save Changes/Run Now/View Logs buttons all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auto-seeds trial-7day automation on first GET /api/admin/automations if none exist
Resend templates are fetched live from Resend API (2 templates detected: Day 1, Welcome Mail)
Background scheduler runs every hour (asyncio task started in server.py lifespan)
Run Now endpoint allows manual trigger for testing
Automation skips users who have upgraded (has paid plan_assignments)
Email logs are persisted per user/day/automation for tracking
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_automations.py - Created comprehensive test suite for automations feature

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Automation is auto-seeded on first GET request if none exist in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Automations feature fully tested. Backend at /api/admin/automations/* with 6 endpoints. Frontend AutomationsSection component renders in admin panel under 'Automations' tab (sidebar item id='automations'). Uses data-testid attributes for testing. Resend API integration is LIVE (not mocked) - templates are fetched from Resend account.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/automations: Lists automations with stats, auto-seeds if empty
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/automations/{id}/logs: Returns email send logs with pagination

ui_elements_verified: Email Automations header with Refresh Templates button
2 Resend templates info banner showing detected templates
7-Day Free Trial Sequence card with description
7 day configuration rows with: number, toggle, template dropdown, subject input
View Logs button (expands to show Recent Email Logs section)
Logs display 'No emails sent yet' when empty

test_scenarios_covered: List automations returns seeded 7-day trial automation
Run automation now returns execution stats
Frontend tab navigation to Automations section
background_scheduler_note: The run_automations_scheduler runs as an asyncio task every hour. It processes all enabled automations, finds free trial users in the right day window, and sends emails via Resend templates. Users who have upgraded are skipped.
